currently_shipping._comment: Source of truth for the home-page CurrentlyShipping strip. Each id below references a key in `features`. Update both this index and the underlying feature entry when an item ships or moves between sections. See /docs-internal/CURRENTLY_SHIPPING_UPDATE_WORKFLOW.md for the weekly cadence.

evm_native_wallets.label: EVM native wallet operations
evm_native_wallets.summary: Send, create, import, balance, export across Ethereum, BSC, Base, and Polygon. Plain English. Multi chain conversation flow.

solana_wallet_management.label: Solana wallet management
solana_wallet_management.summary: Create, import, label, and switch Solana wallets via Dale or panel. SOL sends shipping in next update.

usd_pin_threshold.label: USD-based PIN threshold
usd_pin_threshold.summary: PIN gate runs on USD value, user-settable. Default $1000. Set to 0 for PIN on every trade.

dale_honesty_rules.label: Dale honesty rules
dale_honesty_rules.summary: Dale reports actual tool outcomes. No invented diagnoses. Em dash filter on outgoing messages.

deepai_zero_tax.label: $DEEPAI zero tax
deepai_zero_tax.summary: Buy/sell tax updated to 0/0 on chain. No fees on entering or exiting the token.

trade_panel_solana.label: /trade panel Solana support
trade_panel_solana.summary: SOL sends, SPL token sends, Solana wallet creation from /trade panel. PIN gated.

genesis_cohort.label: Genesis Cohort recognition
genesis_cohort.summary: Awakening attendees get priority routing, 3 months DeepBot PRO automatic, Genesis-only feedback channel. Effective date pending.

solana_sends.label: Solana on-chain sends
solana_sends.summary: Native SOL and SPL token sends from Dale. EVM sends shipped May 14, Solana sends queued.

trade_settlement_check.label: Trade execution settlement check
trade_settlement_check.summary: On-chain settlement verification before reporting trade success.

swap_address_validation.label: Swap engine address validation
swap_address_validation.summary: Pre-flight address validation on every swap to catch typos and lookalike addresses before signing.

native_slippage_in_chat.label: Native slippage controls in chat
native_slippage_in_chat.summary: Set and adjust slippage per trade in conversation, no menu surface needed.

cold_wallet_setup_patch.label: Cold wallet setup patch
cold_wallet_setup_patch.summary: Smoother cold wallet provisioning and panic PIN cold address designation.

solana_execution.label: Solana execution
solana_execution.summary: Native Solana execution alongside Ethereum, Base, BSC, and Polygon. Jupiter routing, multi-DEX coverage, self-custody import.

solana_convergence.label: Solana convergence
solana_convergence.summary: Convergence engine extends to Solana. pump.fun listener, Jupiter routing telemetry, Raydium and Orca and Meteora pool signals, sniper bot activity surfacing in convergence.

multichain_pin_gate.label: Multi-chain PIN gate
multichain_pin_gate.summary: Chain-first PIN enforcement. PIN gate fires before chain branch, all networks, all security levels.

dale_forget_me.label: Dale ephemeral memory wipe
dale_forget_me.summary: /forget_me wipes Dale's ephemeral conversation memory on demand. Self-served, no support ticket needed.

convergence_engine.label: Convergence engine
convergence_engine.summary: 13 source-type tags, 19 routers, 4 chains, MySQL stores, first signals firing live.

dale_escalation_pipeline.label: Dale escalation pipeline
dale_escalation_pipeline.summary: Critical-severity auto-page to admin via Go API. 428 copilot tests green, all flag-gated.

bobby_alert_idempotency_v1.label: Bobby alert idempotency v1
bobby_alert_idempotency_v1.summary: Server-side unique on (chain, tx_hash, source_type). First-wins. Zero duplicate alert leaks.

convergence_weight_tuning.label: Convergence weight tuning
convergence_weight_tuning.summary: Correlation, mutual information, GBDT+SHAP across 5yr Bobby data. Signal threshold optimization.

smart_money_cluster_scoring_v2.label: Smart money cluster scoring v2
smart_money_cluster_scoring_v2.summary: Cross-wallet pattern detection. Splits aggregated bag activity from coordinated entry.

token_metadata_enrichment.label: Token metadata enrichment
token_metadata_enrichment.summary: Admin commands for project Portal/X/website. Renders on The Board. Behind feature flag.

layer_2_dale_memory.label: Layer 2 Dale memory
layer_2_dale_memory.summary: Cross-conversation continuity. 5-phase build. Postgres UserMemoryProfile + summarizer + event-driven triggers.

native_emergency_sell_expansion.label: Native Emergency Sell expansion
native_emergency_sell_expansion.summary: Polygon, BNB chain coverage. Mempool monitoring extends beyond ETH/Base.

bobby_ai_tier_1.label: Bobby AI Tier 1
bobby_ai_tier_1.summary: AdOps admin panel. Manual queue → admin panel → full self-serve.

rocketx_integration.label: RocketX integration
rocketx_integration.summary: Privacy swaps across 200+ chains. Referral tier active.

deepbot_link.label: DeepBot LINK
deepbot_link.summary: Web interface for the platform. Same brain, browser-native. trade.deepbot.pro.

memory_introspection.label: What do you remember about me

wallet_mini_app_unification.label: Wallet Mini App launching from Dale (Phase 2)

wallet_unified_mini_app.label: Unified Mini App across all entry points (Phase 3)

leagues_xp_ranks.label: Leagues, XP, and ranks (Rookie to Legend)

sonar_polygon_solana.label: Sonar DCA on Polygon and Solana

rev_share_calculator_three_engines.label: Rev share calculator with Bobby + Wallet revenue inputs
